from notebookutils import mssparkutils
from pyspark.sql import Row
import json
import datetime
import uuid
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import current_timestamp, current_date

spark: SparkSession = SparkSession.builder.getOrCreate()
storage_account: str = mssparkutils.notebook.run('/utils/py_utils_get_storage_account')
target_table: str = f"odw_standardised_db.sb_{entity_name.replace('-', '_')}"
source_path: str = f"abfss://odw-raw@{storage_account}ServiceBus/{entity_name}/"
service_bus_watermarks_table_path = f"abfss://odw-meta-db@{storage_account}/pln_service_bus_watermarks"

from pyspark.sql.functions import current_date, current_timestamp

spark.sql("CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS odw_meta_db")
spark.sql("USE odw_meta_db")

spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS odw_meta_db.pln_service_bus_watermarks (
  entity_name       STRING,
  last_ingest_time  TIMESTAMP,
  ingest_date       DATE,
  number_files      INT,
  updated_at        TIMESTAMP
)
USING DELTA
LOCATION '{service_bus_watermarks_table_path}'
""")

max_time_df = spark.sql(f"""
SELECT MAX(message_enqueued_time_utc) AS max_time
FROM {target_table}
""")

max_time = max_time_df.collect()[0]["max_time"]

wm_df = spark.createDataFrame([
    (
        entity_name,
        max_time,
        recordsIngested
    )
], [
    "entity_name",
    "last_ingest_time",
    "number_files"
]).withColumn("ingest_date", current_date()) \
  .withColumn("updated_at", current_timestamp())

wm_df.createOrReplaceTempView("wm_upd")

merge_result_df = spark.sql("""
MERGE INTO odw_meta_db.pln_service_bus_watermarks AS tgt
USING wm_upd AS src
ON tgt.entity_name = src.entity_name
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET
  tgt.last_ingest_time = src.last_ingest_time,
  tgt.ingest_date      = src.ingest_date,
  tgt.number_files     = src.number_files,
  tgt.updated_at       = src.updated_at
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (
  entity_name,
  last_ingest_time,
  ingest_date,
  number_files,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  src.entity_name,
  src.last_ingest_time,
  src.ingest_date,
  src.number_files,
  src.updated_at
)
